cover one constellation. The Moon is then in the second quar
ter of Ardra, if the Moon is on the 700th lipta of Mithuna, he
has traversed one hundred liptas in the second quarter of
Ardra. On the day of birth the Moon will be at 22 1/2 ghatikas
of Ardra.
Suppose the lagna is Mesha, a nocturnal sign
(Brihajjataka, 1.10), and the Sun was in Kanya. 1f two ghatis
of Mesh a elapsed by the time of conception, consider the set
ting sign Mina. This has four ghatis and in Mesha two ghatis
are over. Birth will take place. roughly at six ghatis after Sun
set when the Moon is Kanya during the tenth month of the
conception.
